contents: {a=Person_IvoRobotnik}Dr. Robotnik{/} was pregnant and quickly went into labor, whilst taking out the trash. {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{/} rushed them to hospital and, with the help of {a=Person_DoctorCom}Doctor.com{/} and NordVPN, successfully delivered the baby. Robotnik decided to name their new born {a=Person_KevinRobotnik}Kevin{/}. When Nova realized Kevin was not actually their own, {a=Person_Woopinator}Woopinator{/} enters the scene and declares custody over them. Nova and Woopinator then began a cock fight, ending in Nova's defeat and them pooping themselves. Woopinator and Doctor.com then ran away to Fiji, leaving Robotnik with no child support to raise Kevin. Robotnik later drowned Kevin in a nearby hospital sink.
